title: みんなでトップウマドルPJ（プロローグ）_ショートエピソード

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Beep booop! ☆
That's the sound of my<n>Umadol sensor, and it's
pointing me<n>straight to you. You're definitely the<n>
one!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...Ah! Wait up, wait up! Don't run! Sorry,<n>can you
at least hear me out? Pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So here's the thing. I'd like you to help<n>me out
with a little something!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you didn't know, but it's almost<n>Falco's
birthday!
What's that? You'll<n>celebrate it with me? Thank
you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But you know, I'm an Umadol. For me,<n>my
birthday isn't just about getting nice<n>words and
presents...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's also a day for me to thank everyone<n>who's
been cheering me on! So I was<n>thinking...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I want to put on a concert for my<n>birthday! This
party's gonna start with a<n>BANG! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So yeah, I'd love if you could get<n>loooooads of
people to come out for it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
In the meantime, I'll give my dance<n>lessons
everything I've got! I even came<n>up with a
mega-ultra-special training<n>regimen!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So anyway... that's the deal! Please help<n>me make
this the most exciting birthday<n>concert ever!
